# FM module cockpit dock document: the default layout as dockZone.v1 data

## Context

B-split of #14615 (horizon map v2): the cockpit's default layout as a **pure data leaf** — the `dockZone.v1` document expressing the SSOT's 1.55fr/1fr split (fleet zone · stream zone · chrome affordances), separate from the projection wiring so the document is testable/reviewable as data.

## The Fix

Placement `apps/agentos/view/fleet/` (the #14642 convention): (1) the cockpit dock-zone document module (the SSOT layout as `neo.harness.dockZone.v1` data: split orientation + sizes, the two primary zones, secondary panes declared `autoHidden` for #14617); (2) unit specs — document validates against `DockZoneModel`, zone/pane inventory matches the SSOT map, autoHidden declarations present; (3) doc note in the module docs.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The document validates via `DockZoneModel.validate` (fixture) and expresses the SSOT proportions + zones.
- [ ] Secondary panes declared `autoHidden: true` (the #14617 contract's input).
- [ ] Pure data — zero projection/wiring logic (that's the sibling leaf).

## Out of Scope

Projection + resize wiring (sibling split) · rails behavior (#14617) · the mount (#14632).

## Related

Epic #14560 (parent) · split-of #14615 · `#14642` convention · SSOT · `HarnessDockZoneModel.md`.

Sweeps: current window; no equivalent; A2A clean. Structure-map: N/A.
